project.name: Aurum
project.tagline: A commercial landmark at Abb Circle
project.description: Aurum is an ongoing commercial project positioned at the high-visibility Abb Circle location in Nashik.

relatedProjects.name: Livin Solitaire
relatedProjects.tagline: Premium commercial spaces at Canada Corner
relatedProjects.description: Livin Solitaire is an ongoing commercial development at Canada Corner, one of Nashik’s prominent commercial hubs.

relatedProjects.name: The Hub
relatedProjects.locality: Parijat Nagar / Mahatma Nagar Rd, Nashik
relatedProjects.description: The Hub is a completed commercial project on Mahatma Nagar Road, Parijat Nagar — also home to Nisham Developers’ own office.

relatedProjects.name: Nisham Urbania
relatedProjects.tagline: A commercial address on College Road
relatedProjects.description: Nisham Urbania is a completed commercial project on College Road, one of Nashik’s busiest commercial corridors.

relatedProjects.name: Shriniwas Niketan
relatedProjects.tagline: Best Ideal Home Project in the Heart of Nashik
relatedProjects.description: Shriniwas Niketan is located in Mahatma Nagar, one of the premium suburbs of Nashik, offering the best of the city right at your doorstep. This location combines the vibrant energy of city living with the peaceful serenity of a quiet retreat. Shriniwas Niketan offers a collection of luxurious 3 BHK flats, designed for modern families, with each flat offering spacious and well-ventilated living spaces.

relatedProjects.name: Fireflies
relatedProjects.tagline: A hillside residential retreat in Bhavali Hills
relatedProjects.description: Fireflies is an ongoing residential project set in the hills of Bhavali, Igatpuri — designed for a nature-first lifestyle away from the city.
